title: Fencing emitter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''fencing emitter''' was a general type of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade emitter used mainly for heightening the blade's usefulness when parrying enemy attacks. The result, however, is a blade that is less capable of deflecting blaster bolts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
